reviews.comment:
Muy mala atencion y predisposición por parte del personal. Estando en una emergencia sanitaria con mi nena. Me cerraron la puerta del sanitario en la cara.

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service and unhelpful attitude from the staff. I was in a medical emergency with my daughter. They closed the bathroom door in my face.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvX2FTejN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy cordiales todos los playeros, solo una vez un viejito prefirió cargar nafta a un turista antes q a mi q estaba en la fila primero, luego todo de diez.

(Translated by Google)
All the gas station attendants were very friendly, only once did an old man prefer to fill up a tourist's tank before me who was first in line, otherwise everything was great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvcHZITmN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros creen que están en su casa charlan 2 horas mala atención mucha demora pésimo servicio. Viaje reiteradas veces y siempre lo mismo.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants act like they're at home, chatting for two hours. The service is terrible, very slow, and awful. I've traveled there repeatedly and it's always the same.
